name: subagent: when reviewer flags g-ts-001 (any), suggested_fix recommends `// allow-any: <reason>` comment (per T-2 g-ts-001 description)
command: mkdir -p src && printf "const x: any = 1;\n" > src/a.ts && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/_runner.sh" --agent review-types --input "$PWD/src/a.ts" --emit-findings "$PWD/findings.jsonl" 2>/dev/null && grep -E "allow-any:" findings.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
